LAW AND MOTION 302, CROSS-DEFENDANT CAREER GROUP, INC'S MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS-COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DENIED. THE CROSS-COMPLAINT ARISES FROM PROTECTED ACTIVITY, BUT CROSS-COMPLAINANT HAS SHOWN A PROBABILITY OF PREVAILING ON THE MERITS. FURTHER, EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS ARE OVERRULED. CROSS-COMPLAINANTS REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. CROSS COMPLAINANT TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-13-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: CROSS-DEFENDANT CAREER GROUP, INC'S MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS-COMPLAINT. Appearances: Neil D. Martin of Hill Farrer & Burrill LLP (213.620.0460) for cross defendant and moving party; Sonia Y. Lee of Browne Woods George (310.274.7100) for cross complainant and responding party. Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: denied. The cross-complaint arises from protected activity, but cross-complainant has shown a probability of prevailing on the merits. Further, evidentiary objections are overruled. Cross-complainants request for sanctions is denied. Cross complainant to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT
